'''旧暦3月21日'''は[[旧暦]][[3月 (旧暦)|3月]]の21日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[大宝]]元年（[[701年]]_月_日） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に改元 * [[寛仁]]3年（[[1019年]]_月_日） - [[藤原道長]]が出家。[[無量寿院]]の造営に着手する * [[元久]]元年（[[1204年]]_月_日） - [[三日平氏の乱]]。平賀朝雅が伊賀・伊勢の平氏の残党を平定 * [[慶長]]17年（[[1612年]]_月_日） - [[江戸幕府]]が幕府直轄領にキリシタン禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[承和]]2年（[[835年]]_月_日） - [[空海]]（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]]開祖（* [[774年]]） * [[嘉祥]]3年（[[850年]]_月_日） - [[仁明天皇]]、54代[[天皇]] * [[慶安]]3年（[[1650年]]_月_日） - [[柳生三厳]]（十兵衛）、剣術家（* [[1607年]]） * [[元治]]元年（[[1864年]]_月_日） - [[堀田正睦]]、江戸幕府[[老中]]（* [[1810年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[3月20日 (旧暦)|3月20日]] 翌日[[3月22日 (旧暦)|3月22日]] - 前月[[2月21日 (旧暦)|2月21日]] 翌月[[4月21日 (旧暦)|4月21日]] *新暦[[3月21日]]
{{msg:stub}}

'''旧暦3月21日'''は[[旧暦]][[3月 (旧暦)|3月]]の21日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。 {{msg:旧暦3月}}
== できごと == * [[大宝]]元年（[[701年]]_月_日） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に改元 * [[寛仁]]3年（[[1019年]]_月_日） - [[藤原道長]]が出家。[[無量寿院]]の造営に着手する * [[元久]]元年（[[1204年]]_月_日） - [[三日平氏の乱]]。平賀朝雅が伊賀・伊勢の平氏の残党を平定 * [[慶長]]17年（[[1612年]][[4月21日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が幕府直轄領にキリシタン禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[承和]]2年（[[835年]][[4月22日]]） - [[空海]]（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]]開祖（* [[774年]]） * [[嘉祥]]3年（[[850年]][[5月6日]]） - [[仁明天皇]]、54代[[天皇]] * [[慶安]]3年（[[1650年]][[4月21日]]） - [[柳生三厳]]（柳生十兵衛）、剣術家（* [[1607年]]） * [[元治]]元年（[[1864年]][[4月26日]]） - [[堀田正睦]]、江戸幕府[[老中]]（* [[1810年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[3月20日 (旧暦)|3月20日]] 翌日[[3月22日 (旧暦)|3月22日]] - 前月[[2月21日 (旧暦)|2月21日]] 翌月[[4月21日 (旧暦)|4月21日]] *新暦[[3月21日]]

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月21日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の21日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[大宝]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[701年]][[5月3日]]） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * [[寛仁]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1019年]][[4月28日]]） - [[藤原道長]]が出家。[[無量寿院]]の造営に着手する * [[元久]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1204年]][[4月26日]]） - [[三日平氏の乱]]。平賀朝雅が伊賀・伊勢の平氏の残党を平定 * [[慶長]]17年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1612年]][[4月21日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]]禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[承和]]2年（ユリウス暦[[835年]][[4月22日]]） - [[空海]]（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]]開祖（* [[774年]]） * [[嘉祥]]3年（ユリウス暦[[850年]][[5月6日]]） - [[仁明天皇]]、54代[[天皇]]（* [[810年]]） * [[慶安]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1650年]][[4月21日]]） - [[柳生三厳]]（柳生十兵衛）、剣術家（* [[1607年]]） * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[4月26日]]） - [[堀田正睦]]、江戸幕府[[老中]]（* [[1810年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|20|3|22|2|21|4|3|0321}}

== できごと == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[701年]][[5月3日]]） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * [[寛仁]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1019年]][[4月28日]]） - [[藤原道長]]が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]]の造営に着手する * [[元久]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1204年]][[4月26日]]） - [[三日平氏の乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日平氏の乱]]。[[平賀朝雅]]が伊賀・伊勢の平氏の残党を平定 * [[慶長]]17年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1612年]][[4月21日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]]禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]]2年（ユリウス暦[[835年]][[4月22日]]） - [[空海]]<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200年間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}}</ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]]開祖（* [[774年]]） * [[嘉祥]]3年（ユリウス暦[[850年]][[5月6日]]） - [[仁明天皇]]、54代[[天皇]]（* [[810年]]） * [[慶安]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1650年]][[4月21日]]） - [[柳生三厳]]（柳生十兵衛）、剣術家（* [[1607年]]） * [[文政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1822年]][[5月12日]]） - [[松平斉恒]]、第8代[[松江藩]]主（* [[1791年]]） * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[4月26日]]） - [[堀田正睦]]、江戸幕府[[老中]]（* [[1810年]]）

== できごと == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[701年]][[5月3日]]） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * [[寛仁]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1019年]][[4月28日]]） - [[藤原道長]]が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]]の造営に着手する * [[元久]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1204年]][[4月26日]]） - [[三日平氏の乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日平氏の乱]]。[[平賀朝雅]]が伊賀・伊勢の平氏の残党を平定 * [[慶長]]17年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1612年]][[4月21日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]]禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]]2年（ユリウス暦[[835年]][[4月22日]]） - [[空海]]<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200年間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}}</ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]]開祖（* [[774年]]） * [[嘉祥]]3年（ユリウス暦[[850年]][[5月6日]]） - [[仁明天皇]]、54代[[天皇]]（* [[810年]]） * [[慶安]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1650年]][[4月21日]]） - [[柳生三厳]]（柳生十兵衛）、剣術家（* [[1607年]]） * [[文政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1822年]][[5月12日]]） - [[松平斉恒]]、第8代[[松江藩]]主（* [[1791年]]） * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[4月26日]]） - [[堀田正睦]]、江戸幕府[[老中]]（* [[1810年]]）

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月21日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の21日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[701年]][[5月3日]]） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * [[寛仁]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1019年]][[4月28日]]） - [[藤原道長]]が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]]の造営に着手する * [[元久]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1204年]][[4月26日]]） - [[三日平氏の乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日平氏の乱]]。[[平賀朝雅]]が伊賀・伊勢の平氏の残党を平定 * [[慶長]]17年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1612年]][[4月21日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]]禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]]2年（ユリウス暦[[835年]][[4月22日]]） - [[空海]]<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200年間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}}</ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]]開祖（* [[774年]]） * [[嘉祥]]3年（ユリウス暦[[850年]][[5月6日]]） - [[仁明天皇]]、54代[[天皇]]（* [[810年]]） * [[慶安]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1650年]][[4月21日]]） - [[柳生三厳]]（柳生十兵衛）、剣術家（* [[1607年]]） * [[文政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1822年]][[5月12日]]） - [[松平斉恒]]、第8代[[松江藩]]主（* [[1791年]]） * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[4月26日]]） - [[堀田正睦]]、江戸幕府[[老中]]（* [[1810年]]）

revision.text:
[[sn:March 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] [[zh:三月廿一]] [[en:draft:March 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[701]][[5月3日]]） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * [[寛仁]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1019]][[4月28日]]） - [[藤原道長]]が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]]の造営に着手する * [[元久]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1204]][[4月26日]]） - [[三日平氏の乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日平氏の乱]]。[[平賀朝雅]]が伊賀・伊勢の平氏の残党を平定 * [[慶長]]17年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1612]][[4月21日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]]禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]]2年（ユリウス暦[[835]][[4月22日]]） - [[空海]]<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200年間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}}</ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]]開祖（* [[774]]） * [[嘉祥]]3年（ユリウス暦[[850]][[5月6日]]） - [[仁明天皇]]、54代[[天皇]]（* [[810]]） * [[慶安]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1650]][[4月21日]]） - [[柳生三厳]]（柳生十兵衛）、剣術家（* [[1607]]） * [[文政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1822]][[5月12日]]） - [[松平斉恒]]、第8代[[松江藩]]主（* [[1791]]） * [[元治]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1864]][[4月26日]]） - [[堀田正睦]]、江戸幕府[[老中]]（* [[1810]]）
== Commemorations ==

== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[701]][[5月3日]]） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * [[寛仁]]3rd year（ユリウス暦[[1019]][[4月28日]]） - [[藤原道長]]が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]]の造営に着手する * [[元久]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1204]][[4月26日]]） - [[三日平氏の乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日平氏の乱]]。[[平賀朝雅]]が伊賀・伊勢の平氏の残党を平定 * [[慶長]]17th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1612]][[4月21日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]]禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]]2nd year（ユリウス暦[[835]][[4月22日]]） - [[空海]]<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200年間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}}</ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]]開祖（* [[774]]） * [[嘉祥]]3rd year（ユリウス暦[[850]][[5月6日]]） - [[仁明天皇]]、54代[[天皇]]（* [[810]]） * [[慶安]]3rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1650]][[4月21日]]） - [[柳生三厳]]（柳生十兵衛）、剣術家（* [[1607]]） * [[文政]]5th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1822]][[5月12日]]） - [[松平斉恒]]、第8代[[松江藩]]主（* [[1791]]） * [[元治]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1864]][[4月26日]]） - [[堀田正睦]]、江戸幕府[[老中]]（* [[1810]]）
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:March 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] [[zh:三月廿一]] [[en:draft:March 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[701]][[5月3日]]） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * [[寛仁]]3rd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1019]][[4月28日]]） - [[藤原道長]]が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]]の造営に着手する * [[元久]]1st year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1204]][[4月26日]]） - [[三日平氏の乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日平氏の乱]]。[[平賀朝雅]]が伊賀・伊勢の平氏の残党を平定 * [[慶長]]17th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1612]][[4月21日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]]禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]]2nd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[835]][[4月22日]]） - [[空海]]<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200年間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}}</ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]]開祖（* [[774]]） * [[嘉祥]]3rd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[850]][[5月6日]]） - [[仁明天皇]]、54代[[天皇]]（* [[810]]） * [[慶安]]3rd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1650]][[4月21日]]） - [[柳生三厳]]（柳生十兵衛）、剣術家（* [[1607]]） * [[文政]]5th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1822]][[5月12日]]） - [[松平斉恒]]、第8代[[松江藩]]主（* [[1791]]） * [[元治]]1st year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1864]][[4月26日]]） - [[堀田正睦]]、江戸幕府[[老中]]（* [[1810]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|20|3|22|2|21|4|3|0321}}

[[sn:March 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] [[zh:三月廿一]] [[en:draft:March 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[701]][[5月3日]]） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * [[寛仁]]3rd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1019]][[4月28日]]） - [[藤原道長]]が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]]の造営に着手する * [[元久]]1st year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1204]][[4月26日]]） - [[三日平氏の乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日平氏の乱]]。[[平賀朝雅]]が伊賀・伊勢の平氏の残党を平定 * [[Keichō]]17th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1612]][[4月21日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]]禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]]2nd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[835]][[4月22日]]） - [[空海]]<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200年間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}}</ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]]開祖（* [[774]]） * [[嘉祥]]3rd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[850]][[5月6日]]） - [[仁明天皇]]、54代[[天皇]]（* [[810]]） * [[慶安]]3rd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1650]][[4月21日]]） - [[柳生三厳]]（柳生十兵衛）、剣術家（* [[1607]]） * [[文政]]5th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1822]][[5月12日]]） - [[松平斉恒]]、第8代[[松江藩]]主（* [[1791]]） * [[元治]]1st year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1864]][[4月26日]]） - [[堀田正睦]]、江戸幕府[[老中]]（* [[1810]]）
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:March 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] [[zh:三月廿一]] [[en:draft:March 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[701]] [[5月3日]] ） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1019]] [[4月28日]] ） - [[藤原道長]] が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]] の造営に着手する * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1204]] [[4月26日]] ） - [[三日平氏の乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日平氏の乱]] 。[[平賀朝雅]] が伊賀・伊勢の平氏の残党を平定 * [[Keichō]] 17th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[4月21日]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]] 禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[835]] [[4月22日]] ） - [[空海]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200年間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}} </ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]] 開祖（* [[774]] ） * {{ill|Kashō|ja|嘉祥}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[850]] [[5月6日]] ） - [[仁明天皇]] 、54代[[天皇]] （* [[810]] ） * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1650]] [[4月21日]] ） - [[柳生三厳]] （柳生十兵衛）、剣術家（* [[1607]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1822]] [[5月12日]] ） - [[松平斉恒]] 、第8代[[松江藩]] 主（* [[1791]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[4月26日]] ） - [[堀田正睦]] 、江戸幕府[[老中]] （* [[1810]] ）

revision.comment: doing mass replacement for all western dates to english
revision.text:
[[sn:March 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] [[zh:三月廿一]] [[en:draft:March 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[701]] [[May 3]] ） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1019]] [[April 28]] ） - [[藤原道長]] が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]] の造営に着手する * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1204]] [[April 26]] ） - [[三日平氏の乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日平氏の乱]] 。[[平賀朝雅]] が伊賀・伊勢の平氏の残党を平定 * [[Keichō]] 17th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[April 21]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]] 禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[835]] [[April 22]] ） - [[空海]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200年間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}} </ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]] 開祖（* [[774]] ） * {{ill|Kashō|ja|嘉祥}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[850]] [[May 6]] ） - [[仁明天皇]] 、54代[[天皇]] （* [[810]] ） * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1650]] [[April 21]] ） - [[柳生三厳]] （柳生十兵衛）、剣術家（* [[1607]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1822]] [[May 12]] ） - [[松平斉恒]] 、第8代[[松江藩]] 主（* [[1791]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[April 26]] ） - [[堀田正睦]] 、江戸幕府[[老中]] （* [[1810]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|20|3|22|2|21|4|3|0321}}

[[sn:March 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] [[zh:三月廿一]] [[en:draft:March 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[701]] [[May 3]] ） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1019]] [[April 28]] ） - [[藤原道長]] が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]] の造営に着手する * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1204]] [[April 26]] ） - [[三日平氏の乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日平氏の乱]] 。[[平賀朝雅]] が伊賀・伊勢の平氏の残党を平定 * [[Keichō]] 17th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[April 21]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]] 禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[835]] [[April 22]] ） - [[空海]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200年間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}} </ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]] 開祖（* [[774]] ） * {{ill|Kashō|ja|嘉祥}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[850]] [[May 6]] ） - [[仁明天皇]] 、54代[[天皇]] （* [[810]] ） * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1650]] [[April 21]] ） - [[柳生三厳]] （柳生十兵衛）、剣術家（* [[1607]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1822]] [[May 12]] ） - [[松平斉恒]] 、第8代[[松江藩]] 主（* [[1791]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[April 26]] ） - [[堀田正睦]] 、江戸幕府[[老中]] （* [[1810]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

revision.text:
[[sn:March 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] [[zh:三月廿一]] [[en:draft:March 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[701]] [[May 3]] ） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1019]] [[April 28]] ） - [[藤原道長]] が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]] の造営に着手する * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1204]] [[April 26]] ） - [[三日平氏の乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日平氏の乱]] 。[[平賀朝雅]] が伊賀・伊勢の平氏の残党を平定 * [[Keichō]] 17th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[April 21]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]] 禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[835]] [[April 22]] ） - [[空海]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200年間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}} </ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]] 開祖（* [[774]] ） * {{ill|Kashō|ja|嘉祥}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[850]] [[May 6]] ） - [[仁明天皇]] 、54代[[天皇]] （* [[810]] ） * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1650]] [[April 21]] ） - [[柳生三厳]] （柳生十兵衛）、剣術家（* [[1607]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1822]] [[May 12]] ） - [[松平斉恒]] 、第8代[[松江藩]] 主（* [[1791]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[April 26]] ） - [[堀田正睦]] 、江戸幕府[[老中]] （* [[1810]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|20|3|22|2|21|4|3|0321}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[701]] [[May 3]] ） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1019]] [[April 28]] ） - [[藤原道長]] が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]] の造営に着手する * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1204]] [[April 26]] ） - [[三日平氏の乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日平氏の乱]] 。[[平賀朝雅]] が伊賀・伊勢の平氏の残党を平定 * [[Keichō]] 17th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[April 21]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]] 禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[835]] [[April 22]] ） - [[空海]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200年間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}} </ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]] 開祖（* [[774]] ） * {{ill|Kashō|ja|嘉祥}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[850]] [[May 6]] ） - [[仁明天皇]] 、54代[[天皇]] （* [[810]] ） * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1650]] [[April 21]] ） - [[柳生三厳]] （柳生十兵衛）、剣術家（* [[1607]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1822]] [[May 12]] ） - [[松平斉恒]] 、第8代[[松江藩]] 主（* [[1791]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[April 26]] ） - [[堀田正睦]] 、江戸幕府[[老中]] （* [[1810]] ）

revision.comment: Fixing the qq replacement as it causes problems in a lot of pages
revision.text:
[[sn:March 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] [[zh:三月廿一]] [[en:draft:March 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[701]] [[May 3]] ） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1019]] [[April 28]] ） - [[藤原道長]] が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]] の造営に着手する * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1204]] [[April 26]] ） - [[三日平氏の乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日平氏の乱]] 。[[平賀朝雅]] が伊賀・伊勢の平氏の残党を平定 * [[Keichō]] 17th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[April 21]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]] 禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[835]] [[April 22]] ） - [[空海]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200年間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}} </ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]] 開祖（* [[774]] ） * {{ill|Kashō|ja|嘉祥}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[850]] [[May 6]] ） - [[仁明天皇]] 、54代[[天皇]] （* [[810]] ） * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1650]] [[April 21]] ） - [[柳生三厳]] （柳生十兵衛）、剣術家（* [[1607]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1822]] [[May 12]] ） - [[松平斉恒]] 、第8代[[松江藩]] 主（* [[1791]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[April 26]] ） - [[堀田正睦]] 、江戸幕府[[老中]] （* [[1810]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|20|3|22|2|21|4|3|0321}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[701]] [[May 3]] ） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1019]] [[April 28]] ） - [[藤原道長]] が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]] の造営に着手する * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1204]] [[April 26]] ） - [[三日平氏の乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日平氏の乱]] 。[[平賀朝雅]] が伊賀・伊勢の平氏の残党を平定 * [[Keichō]] 17th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[April 21]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]] 禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[835]] [[April 22]] ） - [[空海]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200年間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}} </ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]] 開祖（* [[774]] ） * {{ill|Kashō|ja|嘉祥}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[850]] [[May 6]] ） - [[仁明天皇]] 、54代[[天皇]] （* [[810]] ） * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1650]] [[April 21]] ） - [[柳生三厳]] （柳生十兵衛）、剣術家（* [[1607]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1822]] [[May 12]] ） - [[松平斉恒]] 、第8代[[松江藩]] 主（* [[1791]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[April 26]] ） - [[堀田正睦]] 、江戸幕府[[老中]] （* [[1810]] ）

== Deaths == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[835]] [[April 22]] ） - [[空海]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200年間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}} </ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]] 開祖（* [[774]] ） * {{ill|Kashō|ja|嘉祥}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[850]] [[May 6]] ） - [[仁明天皇]] 、54代[[天皇]] （* [[810]] ） * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1650]] [[April 21]] ） - [[柳生三厳]] （柳生十兵衛）、剣術家（* [[1607]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1822]] [[May 12]] ） - [[松平斉恒]] 、第8代[[松江藩]] 主（* [[1791]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[April 26]] ） - [[堀田正睦]] 、Tokugawa shogunate[[Rōjū]] （* [[1810]] ）

revision.text:
[[sn:March 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] [[zh:三月廿一]] [[en:draft:March 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[701]] [[May 3]] ） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1019]] [[April 28]] ） - [[藤原道長]] が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]] の造営に着手する * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1204]] [[April 26]] ） - [[三日平氏の乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日平氏の乱]] 。[[平賀朝雅]] が伊賀・伊勢の平氏の残党を平定 * [[Keichō]] 17th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[April 21]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]] 禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[835]] [[April 22]] ） - [[空海]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200年間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}} </ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]] 開祖（* [[774]] ） * {{ill|Kashō|ja|嘉祥}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[850]] [[May 6]] ） - [[仁明天皇]] 、54代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[810]] ） * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1650]] [[April 21]] ） - [[柳生三厳]] （柳生十兵衛）、剣術家（* [[1607]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1822]] [[May 12]] ） - [[松平斉恒]] 、第8代[[松江藩]] 主（* [[1791]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[April 26]] ） - [[堀田正睦]] 、Tokugawa shogunate[[Rōjū]] （* [[1810]] ）

[[sn:March 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] [[zh:三月廿一]] [[en:draft:March 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[701]] [[May 3]] ） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1019]] [[April 28]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]] の造営に着手する * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1204]] [[April 26]] ） - [[三日Taira Clanの乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日Taira Clanの乱]] 。[[平賀朝雅]] が伊賀・伊勢のTaira Clanの残党を平定 * [[Keichō]] 17th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[April 21]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]] 禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[835]] [[April 22]] ） - [[空海]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200年間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}} </ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]] 開祖（* [[774]] ） * {{ill|Kashō|ja|嘉祥}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[850]] [[May 6]] ） - [[仁明天皇]] 、54代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[810]] ） * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1650]] [[April 21]] ） - [[柳生三厳]] （柳生十兵衛）、剣術家（* [[1607]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1822]] [[May 12]] ） - [[松平斉恒]] 、第8代[[松江藩]] 主（* [[1791]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[April 26]] ） - [[堀田正睦]] 、Tokugawa shogunate[[Rōjū]] （* [[1810]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

revision.text:
[[sn:March 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] [[zh:三月廿一]] [[en:draft:March 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[701]] [[May 3]] ） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1019]] [[April 28]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]] の造営に着手する * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1204]] [[April 26]] ） - [[三日Taira Clanの乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日Taira Clanの乱]] 。[[平賀朝雅]] が伊賀・伊勢のTaira Clanの残党を平定 * [[Keichō]] 17th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[April 21]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]] 禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[835]] [[April 22]] ） - [[空海]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200年間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}} </ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]] 開祖（* [[774]] ） * {{ill|Kashō|ja|嘉祥}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[850]] [[May 6]] ） - [[仁明天皇]] 、54代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[810]] ） * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1650]] [[April 21]] ） - [[柳生三厳]] （柳生十兵衛）、剣術家（* [[1607]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1822]] [[May 12]] ） - [[松平斉恒]] 、第8代[[松江藩]] 主（* [[1791]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[April 26]] ） - [[堀田正睦]] 、Tokugawa shogunate[[Rōjū]] （* [[1810]] ）
== Commemorations == == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|20|3|22|2|21|4|3|0321}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[701]] [[May 3]] ） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1019]] [[April 28]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]] の造営に着手する * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1204]] [[April 26]] ） - [[三日Taira Clanの乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日Taira Clanの乱]] 。[[平賀朝雅]] が伊賀・伊勢のTaira Clanの残党を平定 * [[Keichō]] 17th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[April 21]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]] 禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[835]] [[April 22]] ） - [[空海]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200th year 間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}} </ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]] 開祖（* [[774]] ） * {{ill|Kashō|ja|嘉祥}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[850]] [[May 6]] ） - [[仁明天皇]] 、54代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[810]] ） * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1650]] [[April 21]] ） - [[柳生三厳]] （柳生十兵衛）、剣術家（* [[1607]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1822]] [[May 12]] ） - [[松平斉恒]] 、第8代[[松江藩]] 主（* [[1791]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[April 26]] ） - [[堀田正睦]] 、Tokugawa shogunate[[Rōjū]] （* [[1810]] ）

[[sn:March 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] [[zh:三月廿一]] [[en:draft:March 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[701]] [[May 3]] ） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1019]] [[April 28]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]] の造営に着手する * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1204]] [[April 26]] ） - [[三日Taira Clanの乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日Taira Clanの乱]] 。[[平賀朝雅]] が伊賀・伊勢のTaira Clanの残党を平定 * [[Keichō]] 17th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[April 21]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]] 禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[835]] [[April 22]] ） - [[空海]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200th year 間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}} </ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]] 開祖（* [[774]] ） * {{ill|Kashō|ja|嘉祥}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[850]] [[May 6]] ） - [[仁明天皇]] 、54代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[810]] ） * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1650]] [[April 21]] ） - [[柳生三厳]] （柳生十兵衛）、Kenjutsu（* [[1607]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1822]] [[May 12]] ） - [[松平斉恒]] 、第8代[[松江藩]] 主（* [[1791]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[April 26]] ） - [[堀田正睦]] 、Tokugawa shogunate[[Rōjū]] （* [[1810]] ）
== Commemorations ==

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:March 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] [[zh:三月廿一]] [[en:draft:March 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[701]] [[May 3]] ） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1019]] [[April 28]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]] の造営に着手する * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1204]] [[April 26]] ） - [[三日Taira Clanの乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日Taira Clanの乱]] 。[[平賀朝雅]] が伊賀・伊勢のTaira Clanの残党を平定 * [[Keichō]] 17th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[April 21]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]] 禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[835]] [[April 22]] ） - [[空海]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200th year 間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}} </ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]] 開祖（* [[774]] ） * {{ill|Kashō|ja|嘉祥}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[850]] [[May 6]] ） - [[仁明天皇]] 、54代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[810]] ） * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1650]] [[April 21]] ） - [[柳生三厳]] （柳生十兵衛）、Kenjutsu（* [[1607]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1822]] [[May 12]] ） - [[松平斉恒]] 、第8代[[松江藩]] 主（* [[1791]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[April 26]] ） - [[堀田正睦]] 、Tokugawa shogunate[[Rōjū]] （* [[1810]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|20|3|22|2|21|4|3|0321}}

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[701]] [[May 3]] ） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1019]] [[April 28]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]] の造営に着手する * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1204]] [[April 26]] ） - [[三日Taira Clanの乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日Taira Clanの乱]] 。[[平賀朝雅]] が伊賀・伊勢のTaira Clanの残党を平定 * [[Keichō]] 17th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[April 21]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]] 禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[835]] [[April 22]] ） - [[空海]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200th year 間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}} </ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]] 開祖（* [[774]] ） * {{ill|Kashō|ja|嘉祥}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[850]] [[May 6]] ） - [[仁明天皇]] 、54代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[810]] ） * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1650]] [[April 21]] ） - [[柳生三厳]] （柳生十兵衛）、Kenjutsu（* [[1607]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1822]] [[May 12]] ） - [[松平斉恒]] 、第8代[[松江藩]] 主（* [[1791]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[April 26]] ） - [[堀田正睦]] 、Tokugawa shogunate[[Rōjū]] （* [[1810]] ）

== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[701]] [[May 3]] ） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁|12=draft}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1019]] [[April 28]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]] の造営に着手する * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久|12=draft}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1204]] [[April 26]] ） - [[三日Taira Clanの乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日Taira Clanの乱]] 。[[平賀朝雅]] が伊賀・伊勢のTaira Clanの残党を平定 * [[Keichō]] 17th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[April 21]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]] 禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[835]] [[April 22]] ） - [[空海]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200th year 間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}} </ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]] 開祖（* [[774]] ） * {{ill|Kashō|ja|嘉祥|12=draft}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[850]] [[May 6]] ） - [[仁明天皇]] 、54代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[810]] ） * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|12=draft}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1650]] [[April 21]] ） - [[柳生三厳]] （柳生十兵衛）、Kenjutsu（* [[1607]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1822]] [[May 12]] ） - [[松平斉恒]] 、第8代[[松江藩]] 主（* [[1791]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治|12=draft}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[April 26]] ） - [[堀田正睦]] 、Tokugawa shogunate[[Rōjū]] （* [[1810]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[701]] [[May 3]] ） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁|12=draft}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1019]] [[April 28]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]] の造営に着手する * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久|12=draft}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1204]] [[April 26]] ） - [[三日Taira Clanの乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日Taira Clanの乱]] 。[[平賀朝雅]] が伊賀・伊勢のTaira Clanの残党を平定 * [[Keichō]] 17th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[April 21]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]] 禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Daibō|ja|大宝}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[701]] {{ill|May 3|ja|5月3日}}) – Following a gold offering from Tsushima, the era name was changed to {{ill|Daibō|ja|大宝}}. * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1019]] {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|藤原道長}} retired from court life and began the construction of {{ill|Muryōju-in|ja|無量寿院}}. * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1204]] {{ill|April 26|ja|4月26日}}) – During the rebellion of the Taira clan on the 3rd day, known as the {{ill|Mikka Taira no Ran|ja|三日Taira Clanの乱}}, the forces of 【平賀朝雅】 subdued the remnants of the Taira clan in Iga and Ise. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 17th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1612]] {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate issued a decree banning Christianity directly under its control; the measure was expanded nationwide the following year.
== Births == <!-- No births listed -->
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōwa|ja|承和}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[835]] {{ill|April 22|ja|4月22日}}) – In this year, the monk {{ill|Kūkai|ja|空海}} (also known as Kōbō-Daishi), founder of the Shingon sect, is recorded as having died (note: some sources may differ on dates). * {{ill|Kashō|ja|嘉祥|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[850]] {{ill|May 6|ja|5月6日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Nimmei|ja|仁明天皇}}, the 54th Emperor of Japan, died (born [[810]]). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1650]] {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日}}) – The famous swordsman and Kenjutsu master {{ill|Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja|柳生三厳}} (also known as Yagyū Jūbei) died (born [[1607]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1822]] {{ill|May 12|ja|5月12日}}) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saitō|ja|松平斉恒}}, the 8th lord of the Matsue Domain, died (born [[1791]]). * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1864]] {{ill|April 26|ja|4月26日}}) – {{ill|Horita Masamutsumi|ja|堀田正睦}}, a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Tokugawa shogunate, died (born [[1810]]).

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Daibō|ja|大宝}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[701]] {{ill|May 3|ja|5月3日}}) – Following a gold offering from Tsushima, the era name was changed to {{ill|Daibō|ja|大宝}}. * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1019]] {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|藤原道長}} retired from court life and began the construction of {{ill|Muryōju-in|ja|無量寿院}}. * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1204]] {{ill|April 26|ja|4月26日}}) – During the rebellion of the Taira clan on the 3rd day, known as the {{ill|Mikka Taira no Ran|ja|三日Taira Clanの乱}}, the forces of 【平賀朝雅】 subdued the remnants of the Taira clan in Iga and Ise. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 17th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1612]] {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate issued a decree banning Christianity directly under its control; the measure was expanded nationwide the following year.
== Births == <!-- No births listed -->

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Daibō|ja|大宝}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[701]] {{ill|May 3|ja|5月3日}}) – Following a gold offering from Tsushima, the era name was changed to {{ill|Daibō|ja|大宝}}. * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1019]] {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|藤原道長}} retired from court life and began the construction of {{ill|Muryōju-in|ja|無量寿院}}. * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1204]] {{ill|April 26|ja|4月26日}}) – During the rebellion of the Taira clan on the 3rd day, known as the {{ill|Mikka Taira no Ran|ja|三日Taira Clanの乱}}, the forces of 【平賀朝雅】 subdued the remnants of the Taira clan in Iga and Ise. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 17th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1612]] {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate issued a decree banning Christianity directly under its control; the measure was expanded nationwide the following year.
== Births == <!-- No births listed -->
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōwa|ja|承和}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[835]] {{ill|April 22|ja|4月22日}}) – In this year, the monk {{ill|Kūkai|ja|空海}} (also known as Kōbō-Daishi), founder of the Shingon sect, is recorded as having died (note: some sources may differ on dates). * {{ill|Kashō|ja|嘉祥|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[850]] {{ill|May 6|ja|5月6日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Nimmei|ja|仁明天皇}}, the 54th Emperor of Japan, died (born [[810]]). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1650]] {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日}}) – The famous swordsman and Kenjutsu master {{ill|Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja|柳生三厳}} (also known as Yagyū Jūbei) died (born [[1607]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1822]] {{ill|May 12|ja|5月12日}}) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saitō|ja|松平斉恒}}, the 8th lord of the Matsue Domain, died (born [[1791]]). * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1864]] {{ill|April 26|ja|4月26日}}) – {{ill|Horita Masamutsumi|ja|堀田正睦}}, a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Tokugawa shogunate, died (born [[1810]]).
== Commemorations == <!-- Add any commemorations if needed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|20|3|22|2|21|4|3|0321}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]]

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Daibō|ja|大宝|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[701]] {{ill|May 3|ja|5月3日|12=draft}}) – Following a gold offering from Tsushima, the era name was changed to {{ill|Daibō|ja|大宝|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1019]] {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|藤原道長|12=draft}} retired from court life and began the construction of {{ill|Muryōju-in|ja|無量寿院|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1204]] {{ill|April 26|ja|4月26日|12=draft}}) – During the rebellion of the Taira clan on the 3rd day, known as the {{ill|Mikka Taira no Ran|ja|三日Taira Clanの乱|12=draft}}, the forces of 【平賀朝雅】 subdued the remnants of the Taira clan in Iga and Ise. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長|12=draft}} 17th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1612]] {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日|12=draft}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate issued a decree banning Christianity directly under its control; the measure was expanded nationwide the following year.
== Births == <!-- No births listed -->
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōwa|ja|承和|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[835]] {{ill|April 22|ja|4月22日|12=draft}}) – In this year, the monk {{ill|Kūkai|ja|空海|12=draft}} (also known as Kōbō-Daishi), founder of the Shingon sect, is recorded as having died (note: some sources may differ on dates). * {{ill|Kashō|ja|嘉祥|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[850]] {{ill|May 6|ja|5月6日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Emperor Nimmei|ja|仁明天皇|12=draft}}, the 54th Emperor of Japan, died (born [[810]]). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1650]] {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日|12=draft}}) – The famous swordsman and Kenjutsu master {{ill|Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja|柳生三厳|12=draft}} (also known as Yagyū Jūbei) died (born [[1607]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1822]] {{ill|May 12|ja|5月12日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saitō|ja|松平斉恒|12=draft}}, the 8th lord of the Matsue Domain, died (born [[1791]]). * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1864]] {{ill|April 26|ja|4月26日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Horita Masamutsumi|ja|堀田正睦|12=draft}}, a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Tokugawa shogunate, died (born [[1810]]).

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Daibō|ja|大宝|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[701]] {{ill|May 3|ja|5月3日|12=draft}}) – Following a gold offering from Tsushima, the era name was changed to {{ill|Daibō|ja|大宝|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1019]] {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|藤原道長|12=draft}} retired from court life and began the construction of {{ill|Muryōju-in|ja|無量寿院|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1204]] {{ill|April 26|ja|4月26日|12=draft}}) – During the rebellion of the Taira clan on the 3rd day, known as the {{ill|Mikka Taira no Ran|ja|三日Taira Clanの乱|12=draft}}, the forces of 【平賀朝雅】 subdued the remnants of the Taira clan in Iga and Ise. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長|12=draft}} 17th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1612]] {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日|12=draft}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate issued a decree banning Christianity directly under its control; the measure was expanded nationwide the following year.
== Births == <!-- No births listed -->
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōwa|ja|承和|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[835]] {{ill|April 22|ja|4月22日|12=draft}}) – In this year, the monk {{ill|Kūkai|ja|空海|12=draft}} (also known as Kōbō-Daishi), founder of the Shingon sect, is recorded as having died (note: some sources may differ on dates). * {{ill|Kashō|ja|嘉祥|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[850]] {{ill|May 6|ja|5月6日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Emperor Nimmei|ja|仁明天皇|12=draft}}, the 54th Emperor of Japan, died (born [[810]]). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1650]] {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日|12=draft}}) – The famous swordsman and Kenjutsu master {{ill|Yagyū Sanjūrō|ja|柳生三厳|12=draft}} (also known as Yagyū Jūbei) died (born [[1607]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1822]] {{ill|May 12|ja|5月12日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saitō|ja|松平斉恒|12=draft}}, the 8th lord of the Matsue Domain, died (born [[1791]]). * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1864]] {{ill|April 26|ja|4月26日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Horita Masamutsumi|ja|堀田正睦|12=draft}}, a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Tokugawa shogunate, died (born [[1810]]).

revision.text:
{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月21日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の21日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[701年]][[5月3日]]） - 対馬からの金の献上により大宝に[[改元]] * [[寛仁]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1019年]][[4月28日]]） - [[藤原道長]]が出家。[[法成寺|無量寿院]]の造営に着手する * [[元久]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1204年]][[4月26日]]） - [[三日平氏の乱 (鎌倉時代)|三日平氏の乱]]。[[平賀朝雅]]が伊賀・伊勢の平氏の残党を平定 * [[慶長]]17年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1612年]][[4月21日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が幕府直轄領に[[キリシタン]]禁教令を発令。翌年全国に拡大
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]]2年（ユリウス暦[[835年]][[4月22日]]） - [[空海]]<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://wakayama-rekishi100.jp/story/025.html|title=高野山奥之院御廟 〜1200年間続く弘法大師空海の食事〜｜わかやま歴史物語|accessdate=2021-02-26}}</ref>（弘法大師）、[[真言宗]]開祖（* [[774年]]） * [[嘉祥]]3年（ユリウス暦[[850年]][[5月6日]]） - [[仁明天皇]]、54代[[天皇]]（* [[810年]]） * [[慶安]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1650年]][[4月21日]]） - [[柳生三厳]]（柳生十兵衛）、剣術家（* [[1607年]]） * [[文政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1822年]][[5月12日]]） - [[松平斉恒]]、第8代[[松江藩]]主（* [[1791年]]） * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[4月26日]]） - [[堀田正睦]]、江戸幕府[[老中]]（* [[1810年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|20|3|22|2|21|4|3|0321}}
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 21일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月廿一]][[zh:三月廿一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q838922]] Wikidata name: 21st day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 21|qq=March 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Taiho|Daibō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:701|701]] [[:en:May 3|May 3]]) – Following a gold offering from Tsushima, the era name was changed to [[:en:Taiho|Daibō]]. * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1019|1019]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michinaga|Fujiwara no Michinaga]] retired from court life and began the construction of {{ill|Muryōju-in|ja|無量寿院|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muryōju-in|qq=|1=temple Muryoju|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11567554}}. * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – During the rebellion of the Taira clan on the 3rd day, known as the {{ill|Mikka Taira no Ran|ja|三日Taira Clanの乱|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikka Taira no Ran|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the forces of 【平賀朝雅】 subdued the remnants of the Taira clan in Iga and Ise. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1612|1612]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate issued a decree banning Christianity directly under its control; the measure was expanded nationwide the following year. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:835|835]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – In this year, the monk [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] (also known as Kōbō-Daishi), founder of the Shingon sect, is recorded as having died (note: some sources may differ on dates). * [[:en:Kashō|Kashō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:850|850]] [[:en:May 6|May 6]]) – [[:en:Emperor Ninmyō|Emperor Nimmei]], the 54th Emperor of Japan, died (born [[:en:810|810]]). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The famous swordsman and Kenjutsu master [[:en:Yagyū Jūbei Mitsuyoshi|Yagyū Sanjūrō]] (also known as Yagyū Jūbei) died (born [[:en:1607|1607]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1822|1822]] [[:en:May 12|May 12]]) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saitō|ja|松平斉恒|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saitō|qq=|1=Matsudaira Naritsune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530461}}, the 8th lord of the Matsue Domain, died (born [[:en:1791|1791]]). * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Hotta Masayoshi|Horita Masamutsumi]], a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Tokugawa shogunate, died (born [[:en:1810|1810]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|20|3|22|2|21|4|3|0321|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 21일]][[zh min nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月廿一]][[zh:三月廿一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q838922]] Wikidata name: 21st day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 21|qq=March 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Taiho|Daibō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:701|701]] [[:en:May 3|May 3]]) – Following a gold offering from Tsushima, the era name was changed to [[:en:Taiho|Daibō]]. * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1019|1019]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michinaga|Fujiwara no Michinaga]] retired from court life and began the construction of {{ill|Muryōju-in|ja|無量寿院|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muryōju-in|qq=|1=temple Muryoju|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11567554}}. * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – During the rebellion of the Taira clan on the 3rd day, known as the {{ill|Mikka Taira no Ran|ja|三日Taira Clanの乱|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikka Taira no Ran|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the forces of 【平賀朝雅】 subdued the remnants of the Taira clan in Iga and Ise. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1612|1612]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate issued a decree banning Christianity directly under its control; the measure was expanded nationwide the following year. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:835|835]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – In this year, the monk [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] (also known as Kōbō-Daishi), founder of the Shingon sect, is recorded as having died (note: some sources may differ on dates). * [[:en:Kashō|Kashō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:850|850]] [[:en:May 6|May 6]]) – [[:en:Emperor Ninmyō|Emperor Nimmei]], the 54th Emperor of Japan, died (born [[:en:810|810]]). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The famous swordsman and Kenjutsu master [[:en:Yagyū Jūbei Mitsuyoshi|Yagyū Sanjūrō]] (also known as Yagyū Jūbei) died (born [[:en:1607|1607]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1822|1822]] [[:en:May 12|May 12]]) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saitō|ja|松平斉恒|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saitō|qq=|1=Matsudaira Naritsune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530461}}, the 8th lord of the Matsue Domain, died (born [[:en:1791|1791]]). * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Hotta Masayoshi|Horita Masamutsumi]], a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Tokugawa shogunate, died (born [[:en:1810|1810]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Taiho|Daibō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:701|701]] [[:en:May 3|May 3]]) – Following a gold offering from Tsushima, the era name was changed to [[:en:Taiho|Daibō]]. * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1019|1019]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michinaga|Fujiwara no Michinaga]] retired from court life and began the construction of {{ill|Muryōju-in|ja|無量寿院|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muryōju-in|qq=|1=temple Muryoju|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11567554}}. * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – During the rebellion of the Taira clan on the 3rd day, known as the {{ill|Mikka Taira no Ran|ja|三日Taira Clanの乱|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikka Taira no Ran|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the forces of 【平賀朝雅】 subdued the remnants of the Taira clan in Iga and Ise. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1612|1612]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate issued a decree banning Christianity directly under its control; the measure was expanded nationwide the following year. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:835|835]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – In this year, the monk [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] (also known as Kōbō-Daishi), founder of the Shingon sect, is recorded as having died (note: some sources may differ on dates). * [[:en:Kashō|Kashō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:850|850]] [[:en:May 6|May 6]]) – [[:en:Emperor Ninmyō|Emperor Nimmei]], the 54th Emperor of Japan, died (born [[:en:810|810]]). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The famous swordsman and Kenjutsu master [[:en:Yagyū Jūbei Mitsuyoshi|Yagyū Sanjūrō]] (also known as Yagyū Jūbei) died (born [[:en:1607|1607]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1822|1822]] [[:en:May 12|May 12]]) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saitō|ja|松平斉恒|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saitō|qq=|1=Matsudaira Naritsune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530461}}, the 8th lord of the Matsue Domain, died (born [[:en:1791|1791]]). * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Hotta Masayoshi|Horita Masamutsumi]], a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Tokugawa shogunate, died (born [[:en:1810|1810]]).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:835|835]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – In this year, the monk [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] (also known as Kōbō-Daishi), founder of the Shingon sect, is recorded as having died (note: some sources may differ on dates). * [[:en:Kashō|Kashō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:850|850]] [[:en:May 6|May 6]]) – [[:en:Emperor Ninmyō|Emperor Nimmei]], the 54th Emperor of Japan, died (born [[:en:810|810]]). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The famous swordsman and Kenjutsu master [[:en:Yagyū Jūbei Mitsuyoshi|Yagyū Sanjūrō]] (also known as Yagyū Jūbei) died (born [[:en:1607|1607]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1822|1822]] [[:en:May 12|May 12]]) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saitō|ja|松平斉恒|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saitō|1=Matsudaira Naritsune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530461}}, the 8th lord of the Matsue Domain, died (born [[:en:1791|1791]]). * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Hotta Masayoshi|Horita Masamutsumi]], a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Tokugawa shogunate, died (born [[:en:1810|1810]]).

[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] {{wikidata link|Q838922}}

revision.comment: Bot: Add Wikidata has short description - based on Wikidata English short description
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿一]][[zh:三月廿一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q838922]] Wikidata name: 21st day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 21|qq=March 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Taiho|Daibō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:701|701]] [[:en:May 3|May 3]]) – Following a gold offering from Tsushima, the era name was changed to [[:en:Taiho|Daibō]]. * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1019|1019]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michinaga|Fujiwara no Michinaga]] retired from court life and began the construction of {{ill|Muryōju-in|ja|無量寿院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muryōju-in|1=temple Muryoju|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11567554}}. * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – During the rebellion of the Taira clan on the 3rd day, known as the {{ill|Mikka Taira no Ran|ja|三日Taira Clanの乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikka Taira no Ran|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the forces of 【平賀朝雅】 subdued the remnants of the Taira clan in Iga and Ise. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1612|1612]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate issued a decree banning Christianity directly under its control; the measure was expanded nationwide the following year. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:835|835]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – In this year, the monk [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] (also known as Kōbō-Daishi), founder of the Shingon sect, is recorded as having died (note: some sources may differ on dates). * [[:en:Kashō|Kashō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:850|850]] [[:en:May 6|May 6]]) – [[:en:Emperor Ninmyō|Emperor Nimmei]], the 54th Emperor of Japan, died (born [[:en:810|810]]). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The famous swordsman and Kenjutsu master [[:en:Yagyū Jūbei Mitsuyoshi|Yagyū Sanjūrō]] (also known as Yagyū Jūbei) died (born [[:en:1607|1607]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1822|1822]] [[:en:May 12|May 12]]) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saitō|ja|松平斉恒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saitō|1=Matsudaira Naritsune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530461}}, the 8th lord of the Matsue Domain, died (born [[:en:1791|1791]]). * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Hotta Masayoshi|Horita Masamutsumi]], a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Tokugawa shogunate, died (born [[:en:1810|1810]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|20|3|22|2|21|4|3|0321|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:835|835]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – In this year, the monk [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] (also known as Kōbō-Daishi), founder of the Shingon sect, is recorded as having died (note: some sources may differ on dates). * [[:en:Kashō|Kashō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:850|850]] [[:en:May 6|May 6]]) – [[:en:Emperor Ninmyō|Emperor Nimmei]], the 54th Emperor of Japan, died (born [[:en:810|810]]). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The famous swordsman and Kenjutsu master [[:en:Yagyū Jūbei Mitsuyoshi|Yagyū Sanjūrō]] (also known as Yagyū Jūbei) died (born [[:en:1607|1607]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1822|1822]] [[:en:May 12|May 12]]) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saitō|ja|松平斉恒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saitō|1=Matsudaira Naritsune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530461}}, the 8th lord of the Matsue Domain, died (born [[:en:1791|1791]]). * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Hotta Masayoshi|Horita Masamutsumi]], a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Tokugawa shogunate, died (born [[:en:1810|1810]]).

[[ko:음력 3월 21일]] [[ja:3月21日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:三月廿一]]

[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿一]] {{wikidata link|Q838922}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 21일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月廿一]][[zh:三月廿一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿一]][[zh:三月廿一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q838922]] Wikidata name: 21st day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 21|qq=March 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Taiho|Daibō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:701|701]] [[:en:May 3|May 3]]) – Following a gold offering from Tsushima, the era name was changed to [[:en:Taiho|Daibō]]. * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1019|1019]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michinaga|Fujiwara no Michinaga]] retired from court life and began the construction of {{ill|Muryōju-in|ja|無量寿院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muryōju-in|1=temple Muryoju|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11567554}}. * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – During the rebellion of the Taira clan on the 3rd day, known as the {{ill|Mikka Taira no Ran|ja|三日Taira Clanの乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikka Taira no Ran|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the forces of 【平賀朝雅】 subdued the remnants of the Taira clan in Iga and Ise. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1612|1612]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate issued a decree banning Christianity directly under its control; the measure was expanded nationwide the following year. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:835|835]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – In this year, the monk [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] (also known as Kōbō-Daishi), founder of the Shingon sect, is recorded as having died (note: some sources may differ on dates). * [[:en:Kashō|Kashō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:850|850]] [[:en:May 6|May 6]]) – [[:en:Emperor Ninmyō|Emperor Nimmei]], the 54th Emperor of Japan, died (born [[:en:810|810]]). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The famous swordsman and Kenjutsu master [[:en:Yagyū Jūbei Mitsuyoshi|Yagyū Sanjūrō]] (also known as Yagyū Jūbei) died (born [[:en:1607|1607]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1822|1822]] [[:en:May 12|May 12]]) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saitō|ja|松平斉恒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saitō|1=Matsudaira Naritsune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530461}}, the 8th lord of the Matsue Domain, died (born [[:en:1791|1791]]). * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Hotta Masayoshi|Horita Masamutsumi]], a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Tokugawa shogunate, died (born [[:en:1810|1810]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|20|3|22|2|21|4|3|0321|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Taiho|Daibō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:701|701]] [[:en:May 3|May 3]]) – Following a gold offering from Tsushima, the era name was changed to [[:en:Taiho|Daibō]]. * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1019|1019]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michinaga|Fujiwara no Michinaga]] retired from court life and began the construction of {{ill|Muryōju-in|ja|無量寿院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muryōju-in|1=temple Muryoju|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11567554}}. * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – During the rebellion of the Taira clan on the 3rd day, known as the {{ill|Mikka Taira no Ran|ja|三日Taira Clanの乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikka Taira no Ran|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the forces of 【平賀朝雅】 subdued the remnants of the Taira clan in Iga and Ise. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1612|1612]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate issued a decree banning Christianity directly under its control; the measure was expanded nationwide the following year. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:835|835]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – In this year, the monk [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] (also known as Kōbō-Daishi), founder of the Shingon sect, is recorded as having died (note: some sources may differ on dates). * [[:en:Kashō|Kashō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:850|850]] [[:en:May 6|May 6]]) – [[:en:Emperor Ninmyō|Emperor Nimmei]], the 54th Emperor of Japan, died (born [[:en:810|810]]). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The famous swordsman and Kenjutsu master [[:en:Yagyū Jūbei Mitsuyoshi|Yagyū Sanjūrō]] (also known as Yagyū Jūbei) died (born [[:en:1607|1607]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1822|1822]] [[:en:May 12|May 12]]) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saitō|ja|松平斉恒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saitō|1=Matsudaira Naritsune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530461}}, the 8th lord of the Matsue Domain, died (born [[:en:1791|1791]]). * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Hotta Masayoshi|Horita Masamutsumi]], a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Tokugawa shogunate, died (born [[:en:1810|1810]]).
