== Events == * [[:en:Taiho|Daibō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:701|701]] [[:en:May 3|May 3]]) – Following a gold offering from Tsushima, the era name was changed to [[:en:Taiho|Daibō]]. * [[:en:Kannin|Kannin]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1019|1019]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michinaga|Fujiwara no Michinaga]] retired from court life and began the construction of {{ill|Muryōju-in|ja|無量寿院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muryōju-in|1=temple Muryoju|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11567554}}. * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – During the rebellion of the Taira clan on the 3rd day, known as the {{ill|Mikka Taira no Ran|ja|三日Taira Clanの乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikka Taira no Ran|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the forces of 【平賀朝雅】 subdued the remnants of the Taira clan in Iga and Ise. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1612|1612]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate issued a decree banning Christianity directly under its control; the measure was expanded nationwide the following year. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:835|835]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – In this year, the monk [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] (also known as Kōbō-Daishi), founder of the Shingon sect, is recorded as having died (note: some sources may differ on dates). * [[:en:Kashō|Kashō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:850|850]] [[:en:May 6|May 6]]) – [[:en:Emperor Ninmyō|Emperor Nimmei]], the 54th Emperor of Japan, died (born [[:en:810|810]]). * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – The famous swordsman and Kenjutsu master [[:en:Yagyū Jūbei Mitsuyoshi|Yagyū Sanjūrō]] (also known as Yagyū Jūbei) died (born [[:en:1607|1607]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1822|1822]] [[:en:May 12|May 12]]) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saitō|ja|松平斉恒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saitō|1=Matsudaira Naritsune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530461}}, the 8th lord of the Matsue Domain, died (born [[:en:1791|1791]]). * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Hotta Masayoshi|Horita Masamutsumi]], a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Tokugawa shogunate, died (born [[:en:1810|1810]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|20|3|22|2|21|4|3|0321|qq=}}

{{ill|Keian|en|Keian|WD=Q1146135|lt=Keian}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1650|en|1650|WD=Q6951|lt=1650}} {{ill|April 21|en|April == Events == * {{ill|Taiho|en|Taiho|WD=Q423370|lt=Daibō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|701|en|701|WD=Q23496|lt=701}} {{ill|May 3|en|May 3|WD=Q2547|lt=May 3}}) – Following a gold offering from Tsushima, the era name was changed to {{ill|Taiho|en|Taiho|WD=Q423370|lt=Daibō}}. * {{ill|Kannin|en|Kannin|WD=Q1193951|lt=Kannin}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1019|en|1019|WD=Q19252|lt=1019}} {{ill|April 28|en|April 28|WD=Q2534|lt=April 28}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|en|Fujiwara no Michinaga|WD=Q433133|lt=Fujiwara no Michinaga}} retired from court life and began the construction of {{ill|Muryōju-in|ja|無量寿院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muryōju-in|1=temple Muryoju|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11567554}}. * {{ill|Genkyū|en|Genkyū|WD=Q1194276|lt=Genkyū}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1204|en|1204|WD=Q5228|lt=1204}} {{ill|April 26|en|April 26|WD=Q2532|lt=April 26}}) – During the rebellion of the Taira clan on the 3rd day, known as the {{ill|Mikka Taira no Ran|ja|三日Taira Clanの乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikka Taira no Ran|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the forces of 【平賀朝雅】 subdued the remnants of the Taira clan in Iga and Ise. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 17th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1612|en|1612|WD=Q6771|lt=1612}} {{ill|April 21|en|April 21|WD=Q2525|lt=April 21}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate issued a decree banning Christianity directly under its control; the measure was expanded nationwide the following year. == Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōwa|en|Jōwa|WD=Q3577279|lt=Shōwa}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|835|en|835|WD=Q23894|lt=835}} {{ill|April 22|en|April 22|WD=Q2526|lt=April 22}}) – In this year, the monk {{ill|Kūkai|en|Kūkai|WD=Q222227|lt=Kūkai}} (also known as Kōbō-Daishi), founder of the Shingon sect, is recorded as having died (note: some sources may differ on dates). * {{ill|Kashō|en|Kashō|WD=Q1373157|lt=Kashō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|850|en|850|WD=Q30364|lt=850}} {{ill|May 6|en|May 6|WD=Q2552|lt=May 6}}) – {{ill|Emperor Ninmyō|en|Emperor Ninmyō|WD=Q349271|lt=Emperor Nimmei}}, the 54th Emperor of Japan, died (born {{ill|810|en|810|WD=Q23819|lt=810}}). * {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|WD=Q1146135|lt=Keian}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1650|en|1650|WD=Q6951|lt=1650}} {{ill|April 21|en|April 21|WD=Q2525|lt=April 21}}) – The famous swordsman and Kenjutsu master [[:en:Yagyū Jūbei Mitsuyoshi|Yagyū Sanjūrō]] (also known as Yagyū Jūbei) died (born {{ill|1607|en|1607|WD=Q6756|lt=1607}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1822|en|1822|WD=Q6983|lt=1822}} {{ill|May 12|en|May 12|WD=Q2559|lt=May 12}}) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saitō|ja|松平斉恒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saitō|1=Matsudaira Naritsune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530461}}, the 8th lord of the Matsue Domain, died (born {{ill|1791|en|1791|WD=Q7784|lt=1791}}). * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|WD=Q1325419|lt=Genji}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|WD=Q7704|lt=1864}} {{ill|April 26|en|April 26|WD=Q2532|lt=April 26}}) – {{ill|Hotta Masayoshi|en|Hotta Masayoshi|WD=Q910241|lt=Horita Masamutsumi}}, a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Tokugawa shogunate, died (born {{ill|1810|en|1810|WD=Q6922|lt=1810}}).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿一]][[zh:三月廿一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿一]][[zh:三月廿一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿一]][[zh:三月廿一]]
{{Not to be confused with|March 21|qq=March 21}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 21''' is the 21st day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Taiho|en|Taiho|WD=Q423370|lt=Daibō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|701|en|701|WD=Q23496|lt=701}} {{ill|May 3|en|May 3|WD=Q2547|lt=May 3}}) – Following a gold offering from Tsushima, the era name was changed to {{ill|Taiho|en|Taiho|WD=Q423370|lt=Daibō}}. * {{ill|Kannin|en|Kannin|WD=Q1193951|lt=Kannin}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1019|en|1019|WD=Q19252|lt=1019}} {{ill|April 28|en|April 28|WD=Q2534|lt=April 28}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|en|Fujiwara no Michinaga|WD=Q433133|lt=Fujiwara no Michinaga}} retired from court life and began the construction of {{ill|Muryōju-in|ja|無量寿院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muryōju-in|1=temple Muryoju|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11567554}}. * {{ill|Genkyū|en|Genkyū|WD=Q1194276|lt=Genkyū}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1204|en|1204|WD=Q5228|lt=1204}} {{ill|April 26|en|April 26|WD=Q2532|lt=April 26}}) – During the rebellion of the Taira clan on the 3rd day, known as the {{ill|Mikka Taira no Ran|ja|三日Taira Clanの乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikka Taira no Ran|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the forces of 【平賀朝雅】 subdued the remnants of the Taira clan in Iga and Ise. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 17th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1612|en|1612|WD=Q6771|lt=1612}} {{ill|April 21|en|April 21|WD=Q2525|lt=April 21}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate issued a decree banning Christianity directly under its control; the measure was expanded nationwide the following year. == Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōwa|en|Jōwa|WD=Q3577279|lt=Shōwa}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|835|en|835|WD=Q23894|lt=835}} {{ill|April 22|en|April 22|WD=Q2526|lt=April 22}}) – In this year, the monk {{ill|Kūkai|en|Kūkai|WD=Q222227|lt=Kūkai}} (also known as Kōbō-Daishi), founder of the Shingon sect, is recorded as having died (note: some sources may differ on dates). * {{ill|Kashō|en|Kashō|WD=Q1373157|lt=Kashō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|850|en|850|WD=Q30364|lt=850}} {{ill|May 6|en|May 6|WD=Q2552|lt=May 6}}) – {{ill|Emperor Ninmyō|en|Emperor Ninmyō|WD=Q349271|lt=Emperor Nimmei}}, the 54th Emperor of Japan, died (born {{ill|810|en|810|WD=Q23819|lt=810}}). * {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|WD=Q1146135|lt=Keian}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1650|en|1650|WD=Q6951|lt=1650}} {{ill|April 21|en|April 21|WD=Q2525|lt=April 21}}) – The famous swordsman and Kenjutsu master [[:en:Yagyū Jūbei Mitsuyoshi|Yagyū Sanjūrō]] (also known as Yagyū Jūbei) died (born {{ill|1607|en|1607|WD=Q6756|lt=1607}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1822|en|1822|WD=Q6983|lt=1822}} {{ill|May 12|en|May 12|WD=Q2559|lt=May 12}}) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saitō|ja|松平斉恒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saitō|1=Matsudaira Naritsune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530461}}, the 8th lord of the Matsue Domain, died (born {{ill|1791|en|1791|WD=Q7784|lt=1791}}). * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|WD=Q1325419|lt=Genji}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|WD=Q7704|lt=1864}} {{ill|April 26|en|April 26|WD=Q2532|lt=April 26}}) – {{ill|Hotta Masayoshi|en|Hotta Masayoshi|WD=Q910241|lt=Horita Masamutsumi}}, a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Tokugawa shogunate, died (born {{ill|1810|en|1810|WD=Q6922|lt=1810}}).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|20|3|22|2|21|4|3|0321|qq=}}

== Events == * {{ill|Taiho|en|Taiho|WD=Q423370|lt=Daibō|1=Taiho}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|701|en|701|WD=Q23496|lt=701|1=701}} {{ill|May 3|en|May 3|WD=Q2547|lt=May 3|1=May 3}}) – Following a gold offering from Tsushima, the era name was changed to {{ill|Taiho|en|Taiho|WD=Q423370|lt=Daibō|1=Taiho}}. * {{ill|Kannin|en|Kannin|WD=Q1193951|lt=Kannin|1=Kannin}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1019|en|1019|WD=Q19252|lt=1019|1=1019}} {{ill|April 28|en|April 28|WD=Q2534|lt=April 28|1=April 28}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|en|Fujiwara no Michinaga|WD=Q433133|lt=Fujiwara no Michinaga|1=Fujiwara no Michinaga}} retired from court life and began the construction of {{ill|Muryōju-in|ja|無量寿院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muryōju-in|1=temple Muryoju|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11567554}}. * {{ill|Genkyū|en|Genkyū|WD=Q1194276|lt=Genkyū|1=Genkyū}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1204|en|1204|WD=Q5228|lt=1204|1=1204}} {{ill|April 26|en|April 26|WD=Q2532|lt=April 26|1=April 26}}) – During the rebellion of the Taira clan on the 3rd day, known as the {{ill|Mikka Taira no Ran|ja|三日Taira Clanの乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikka Taira no Ran|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the forces of 【平賀朝雅】 subdued the remnants of the Taira clan in Iga and Ise. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 17th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1612|en|1612|WD=Q6771|lt=1612|1=1612}} {{ill|April 21|en|April 21|WD=Q2525|lt=April 21|1=April 21}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate issued a decree banning Christianity directly under its control; the measure was expanded nationwide the following year. == Births ==

== Events == * {{ill|Taiho|en|Taiho|qid=Q423370|lt=Daibō|1=Taiho}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|701|en|701|qid=Q23496|lt=701|1=701}} {{ill|May 3|en|May 3|qid=Q2547|lt=May 3|1=May 3}}) – Following a gold offering from Tsushima, the era name was changed to {{ill|Taiho|en|Taiho|qid=Q423370|lt=Daibō|1=Taiho}}. * {{ill|Kannin|en|Kannin|qid=Q1193951|lt=Kannin|1=Kannin}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1019|en|1019|qid=Q19252|lt=1019|1=1019}} {{ill|April 28|en|April 28|qid=Q2534|lt=April 28|1=April 28}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|en|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qid=Q433133|lt=Fujiwara no Michinaga|1=Fujiwara no Michinaga}} retired from court life and began the construction of {{ill|Muryōju-in|ja|無量寿院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muryōju-in|1=temple Muryoju|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11567554}}. * {{ill|Genkyū|en|Genkyū|qid=Q1194276|lt=Genkyū|1=Genkyū}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1204|en|1204|qid=Q5228|lt=1204|1=1204}} {{ill|April 26|en|April 26|qid=Q2532|lt=April 26|1=April 26}}) – During the rebellion of the Taira clan on the 3rd day, known as the {{ill|Mikka Taira no Ran|ja|三日Taira Clanの乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikka Taira no Ran|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the forces of 【平賀朝雅】 subdued the remnants of the Taira clan in Iga and Ise. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 17th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1612|en|1612|qid=Q6771|lt=1612|1=1612}} {{ill|April 21|en|April 21|qid=Q2525|lt=April 21|1=April 21}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate issued a decree banning Christianity directly under its control; the measure was expanded nationwide the following year. == Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōwa|en|Jōwa|qid=Q3577279|lt=Shōwa|1=Jōwa}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|835|en|835|qid=Q23894|lt=835|1=835}} {{ill|April 22|en|April 22|qid=Q2526|lt=April 22|1=April 22}}) – In this year, the monk {{ill|Kūkai|en|Kūkai|qid=Q222227|lt=Kūkai|1=Kūkai}} (also known as Kōbō-Daishi), founder of the Shingon sect, is recorded as having died (note: some sources may differ on dates). * {{ill|Kashō|en|Kashō|qid=Q1373157|lt=Kashō|1=Kashō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|850|en|850|qid=Q30364|lt=850|1=850}} {{ill|May 6|en|May 6|qid=Q2552|lt=May 6|1=May 6}}) – {{ill|Emperor Ninmyō|en|Emperor Ninmyō|qid=Q349271|lt=Emperor Nimmei|1=Emperor Ninmyō}}, the 54th Emperor of Japan, died (born {{ill|810|en|810|qid=Q23819|lt=810|1=810}}). * {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|qid=Q1146135|lt=Keian|1=Keian}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1650|en|1650|qid=Q6951|lt=1650|1=1650}} {{ill|April 21|en|April 21|qid=Q2525|lt=April 21|1=April 21}}) – The famous swordsman and Kenjutsu master [[:en:Yagyū Jūbei Mitsuyoshi|Yagyū Sanjūrō]] (also known as Yagyū Jūbei) died (born {{ill|1607|en|1607|qid=Q6756|lt=1607|1=1607}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1822|en|1822|qid=Q6983|lt=1822|1=1822}} {{ill|May 12|en|May 12|qid=Q2559|lt=May 12|1=May 12}}) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saitō|ja|松平斉恒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saitō|1=Matsudaira Naritsune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11530461}}, the 8th lord of the Matsue Domain, died (born {{ill|1791|en|1791|qid=Q7784|lt=1791|1=1791}}). * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji|1=Genji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}} {{ill|April 26|en|April 26|qid=Q2532|lt=April 26|1=April 26}}) – {{ill|Hotta Masayoshi|en|Hotta Masayoshi|qid=Q910241|lt=Horita Masamutsumi|1=Hotta Masayoshi}}, a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Tokugawa shogunate, died (born {{ill|1810|en|1810|qid=Q6922|lt=1810|1=1810}}).
